description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages containers, build, test, and deploy, using the Windows Docker image registry.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gstreamer/amd64/windows:2023-08-24.0-main for all Windows jobs and no services. In the build stage define build centos:8 and build fedora:42 jobs that run `meson --werror --warnlevel 2 -Dgtk_doc=enabled --prefix=$PREFIX -Db_coverage=true build/` then `ninja -C build/`, cache the build directory as an artifact, and define four MSVC jobs (build msvc amd64, build msvc amd64 openssl, build msvc x86, build msvc x86 openssl) that set `$env:MESON_ARGS`, invoke `VsDevCmd.bat` via `cmd.exe /C`, download subprojects, then run `meson build $env:MESON_ARGS && ninja -C build && meson test -C build --print-errorlogs --suite libnice`, with the openssl variants adding `-Dcrypto-library=openssl`; all Windows jobs inherit the .build windows image, produce `build/meson-logs/` artifacts on failure and publish JUnit reports. Also add a build msys2 job that configures PowerShell error handling, updates PATH, normalizes line breaks in `$env:MESON_ARGS`, runs `meson build $env:MESON_ARGS`, `ninja -j 1 -C build`, and `meson test -C build --print-errorlogs --suite libnice` via MSYS2 bash, allowing failure and storing `build/meson-logs/` and `build/build.ninja` as artifacts. In the containers stage, create build-centos-container:8 and build-fedora-container:42 jobs that install the listed packages, execute the `FDO_DISTRIBUTION_EXEC` scripts, and build container images. In the test stage, add test centos:8 and test fedora:42 jobs that run `ninja -C build/` and `meson test -C build/ --setup debug`, with an after_script that runs `ninja -C build coverage` and `lcov_cobertura build/meson-logs/coverage.info -o build/meson-logs/coverage.xml`, publishing coverage.xml and JUnit reports on failure; also add test valgrind centos:8 and test valgrind fedora:42 jobs that first run `meson configure build -Dgtk_doc=disabled`, then `ninja -C build/` and `meson test -C build/ --setup valgrind --print-errorlogs`. Add a doc-and-install centos:8 job that runs `ninja -C build/ libnice-doc`, `ninja -C build/ install`, and `ls -lR ${PREFIX}`. Add a pages job that runs `mkdir public/` and `mv build/docs/reference/libnice/html/ public/libnice/`, publishes the `public` directory as GitLab Pages, and runs only on the `latest-release` branch. Finally, add a submit-to-coverity job triggered only on schedules or web that downloads the Coverity tool, extracts it, runs `meson --werror --warnlevel 2 -Dgtk_doc=disabled -Dintrospection=disabled --prefix=$PREFIX cov-build/`, updates PATH, runs `cov-build --dir cov-int ninja -C cov-build`, archives `cov-int` to `libnice.tgz`, and uploads it to scan.coverity.com.
